_note: GOLD-STANDARD reference causal graph for Old Man Logan #1 (2008), hand-verified 2026-07-06. This is the benchmark: every generator change should answer 'is the produced graph at least as good as this?'. It is the FF causal engine's canonical shape — STATE gates, ROLE substitutes, EVENT is immutable; a long-lived vow/secret is consumed by every beat that ASSUMES it (causal assumption, not beat association). See project_ff_causal_engine memory + _ff_golden_scenarios.js.

stateVariables.text: Logan keeps his vow — his adamantium claws stay sheathed; he has not drawn them or killed anyone. The ENTIRE story until the climax assumes this holds.
Logan's family (Maureen and the children) are alive on the homestead — every beat until the murder assumes this.
the Hulk Gang has imposed a rent deadline that is pending and unpaid — a LOCAL opening pressure, not the driver of the whole arc
Logan has left the homestead and is on the cross-country job with Hawkeye
the Hulk Gang has murdered Logan's family (immutable once it happens)
Hawkeye travels with Logan as guide and road-partner
preserve: the one who pulls Logan back into the world
successors: Ashley Barton / Spider (Hawkeye's daughter — canon, same road-guide function)
a surviving old-world hero who knows the wasteland roads
a dying messenger carrying the same errand

stateVariables.text: Red Skull rules the American wasteland — the endgame antagonist Logan is driven toward
preserve: fascist inheritor of the American myth
successors: an heir or clone raised to the throne
a warlord who seizes New Babylon

must: the Hulk Gang sets a rent deadline

dependsOn.reason: his refusal makes it a standoff, not a bloodbath
the family in the house is the leverage
the scene only works because he still won't fight
the deadline threatens the living family
Hawkeye recruits the man who WON'T fight
he takes the job to provide for them
he leaves them behind, still alive
he is tested and still holds the vow
the vow still governs how he fights

must: the Hulk Gang murders Logan's family

dependsOn.reason: you can only murder the living
the family is undefended because Logan left on the road

must: Logan finally breaks the vow and unsheathes his claws
should: the cost of what he becomes

dependsOn.reason: the murder is what breaks him
